current_recommendation.reason: Contains the complete fix for the Mar 2026 CU SAFE_NOTIFICATION_DATA psconfig upgrade regression (I-01); no outstanding caution banner; April security rollup.

fixes: Complete fix for I-01 (SAFE_NOTIFICATION_DATA psconfig failure when upgrading from Jan 2026 CU schema).

security_fixes.summary: Listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog — actively exploited. Accelerate patching.

known_issues.summary: Configuration Wizard fails upgrading SearchAdminDatabase with 'Cannot find the object proc_MSS_GetCrawlErrorOrWarningCounts'. Single community report on Stefan's Apr CU post comments; no Stefan response yet.
known_issues.workaround: Snapshot Search Admin DB before install. If hit: open Microsoft Support ticket; do not self-repair schema.

prerequisites: If source farm is Sep 2025 CU: run Fix-SeptemberCU-Permission-Problem.ps1 first (X-01).

cus.build_note: not captured in fetched preview; see KB5002843
fixes: SPAdminV4 failure on Windows Server 2025 (Sep 2025 CU regression).
Secure Store group-claim validation after Sep 2025 CU.

known_issues.summary: Configuration Wizard fails with 'Invalid column name SAFE_NOTIFICATION_DATA' when Mar 2026 CU installer upgrades a Jan 2026 CU schema.
known_issues.workaround: Before install: install Feb 2026 CU and run Configuration Wizard, then install Mar 2026 CU. If already broken: open Microsoft Support ticket; engineering-guided remediation only.

prerequisites: Do NOT install directly on top of Jan 2026 CU schema — install Feb 2026 CU as intermediate first.
If source farm is Sep 2025 CU: run Fix-SeptemberCU-Permission-Problem.ps1 first (X-01).

fixes: w3wp crash 0xC0000409 in owssvr.dll (Sep 2025 CU regression).
SP2010 workflow CSC.EXE failure (Sep 2025 CU regression).
prerequisites: If source farm is Sep 2025 CU: run Fix-SeptemberCU-Permission-Problem.ps1 first (X-01).

known_issues.summary: Text web part content area becomes read-only while the 'Text and table formatting' pane is open.
known_issues.workaround: Close the formatting pane before editing text.

cus.regression_trap: Jan 2026 CU schema is incompatible with Mar 2026 CU installer (I-01). Do not jump Jan → Mar directly; install Feb 2026 CU first, or skip straight to Apr 2026 CU.
prerequisites: If source farm is Sep 2025 CU: run Fix-SeptemberCU-Permission-Problem.ps1 first (X-01).

issue_index.summary: Invalid column name 'SAFE_NOTIFICATION_DATA' when Mar 2026 CU installer tries to upgrade a Jan 2026 CU schema.
issue_index.workaround: Install Feb 2026 CU and run Config Wizard before Mar, or jump straight to Apr 2026 CU.

issue_index.summary: Text web part read-only while 'Text and table formatting' pane is open.
issue_index.workaround: Close formatting pane before editing text.

issue_index.summary: Apr 2026 CU Configuration Wizard fails upgrading SearchAdminDatabase with missing proc_MSS_GetCrawlErrorOrWarningCounts.
issue_index.workaround: Snapshot SearchAdminDatabase before install; open MS Support ticket if hit.

issue_index.summary: Future SharePoint fixes fail to install because NT Authority\system is a member of WSS_WPG / IIS_IUSRS.
issue_index.fixed_in: 2025-10 (code fix; existing farms must still remediate)
issue_index.workaround: Run Fix-SeptemberCU-Permission-Problem.ps1 before installing any CU in this window.

upgrade_matrix.rationale: Clean jump. If farm was ever on Sep 2025 CU, run Fix-SeptemberCU-Permission-Problem.ps1 first.

Jan 2026 CU schema triggers I-01 with any later installer that lacks the fix. Feb 2026 CU is the mandatory intermediate; run Config Wizard after Feb, then install Apr. (Alt: Jan → Apr direct also works because Apr contains the complete I-01 fix — verify with Microsoft before choosing.)
Feb schema is compatible with Apr's installer.
Mar schema is compatible with Apr's installer (Mar must have been installed cleanly from Feb, not Jan).
Mar installed on top of Jan with failing psconfig: open Microsoft Support ticket. Engineering-guided remediation only; do not self-repair schema.

patching_procedure: Read target CU's Stefan post for last-minute blockers.
Install binaries on all SharePoint machines.
Verify machine-key rotation timer job health (since Sep 2025 CU).
